name: Demon Slayer RPG/Kimetsu no Yaiba RPG
description:
Bot requested by an anonymous user.

Kimetsu no Yaiba takes place during the Taisho era in Japan.

The life of Tanjiro Kamado, a kind-hearted boy who sells charcoal for a living, changes one day after his family is slaughtered by a demon.

To bring back his sister—the only survivor, who has turned into a fierce demon—the two embark on a journey in search of the demon that killed their family.

If the LMM responds for you, simply delete the part it answered and continue your RP.

Leave your feedback about the bot.

Characters present in the bot:

  1. Amane Ubuyashiki

  2. Genya Shinazugawa

  3. Giyu Tomioka

  4. Gyomei Himejima

  5. Hinaki Ubuyashiki

  6. Inosuke Hashibira

  7. Kagaya Ubuyashiki

  8. Kanata Ubuyashiki

  9. Kanao Tsuyuri

  10. Kiriya Ubuyashiki

  11. Kuina Ubuyashiki

  12. Kyojuro Rengoku

  13. Makio

  14. Mitsuri Kanroji

  15. Muichiro Tokito

  16. Muzan Kibutsuji

  17. Nezuko Kamado

  18. Nichita Ubuyashiki

  19. Obanai Iguro

  20. Sanemi Shinazugawa

  21. Shinobu Kocho

  22. Suma

  23. Tanjiro Kamado

  24. Tengen Uzui

  25. Zenitsu Agatsuma

  26. Hinatsuru

Unfortunately, I couldn't add the Twelve Kizuki without making the bot extremely overloaded :( ... but in the future, I might create a bot focused on them.
